chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4493 of 2017 CP D 4702 of 2017 CP D 5447 of 2017 CP D 7037 of 2017 CP D 7878 of 2017 CP D 2175 of 2018 CP D 3943 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.19432/2017. 2. For hearing of main case. 10.03.2025 Mr. Mohsin Ali, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Salman Yousuf, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Asim Iqbal, advocate for the respondent 2/OGRA. Mr. Zeeshan Ahmed, advocate holding brief for Mr. Ghazi Khan Khalil, advocate for the respondent. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. It is jointly submitted that controversy in this petition has already been determined by a Division Bench of this court in judgment dated 03.02.2025 in HCA 336 of 2024 and connected matters. It is therefore, stated that these petitions may also be disposed of upon the terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in each connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
